source: Lopes, Valença & Moura (2026) Landscape and Urban Planning 273:105686 — method uses GSV Time Machine iframes (not static screenshots). Figs 2–4 are paper examples only.

notes.method: Paper embedded GSV iframes for before/after. For this platform, place two images (before.jpg, after.jpg) in each set folder, or replace HTML placeholders with GSV iframe embeds.
notes.block: Each participant: 2 car + 2 bus + 4 active-modes pairwise comparisons (8 total).
